input_question: Which colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used multikinase inhibitor as control?
top_candidate_question: Trials where Cancer type is Colorectal
top_candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';
